prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: CRYSTAL STRUCTURES OF BACILLUS SUBTILIS PHOSPHORIBOSYLPYROPHOSPHATE SYNTHETASE: MOLECULAR BASIS OF ALLOSTERIC INHIBITION AND ACTIVATION.. Entity description: PHOSPHORIBOSYL PYROPHOSPHATE SYNTHETASE. Organism: Bacillus subtilis. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived low-complexity tendency high; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies; withheld discovery hints: hard_topology_word_withheld:large_multidomain_allostery. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: assembly_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context
hard topology hint large_multidomain_allostery is recorded for postseal mining, not handed to E65 as a solved word

v69_context_policy.context_derivation: V69 E65 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. It carries established E65 marks but withholds hard-topology missing-word labels from prediction context so V69 can discover them.
reasons: public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context
hard topology hint large_multidomain_allostery is recorded for postseal mining, not handed to E65 as a solved word
